tutorialWelcome.title: Welcome to the Tutorial!
tutorialWelcome.description: This interactive tutorial will walk you through the basics of using Humanlogs. You'll learn how to work with audio transcriptions through hands-on practice.

tip.label: 💡 Pro Tip:
tip.message: Take your time and explore each feature. You can replay the audio anytime by clicking the play button.
